answer:
Ethics, Tradition, Ritual, Devotion, Fidelity, Legacy.

In the quiet halls of an ancient structure, where the scent of incense lingers in the air, the knights in their polished armor stand at attention, ready to answer the call of duty. The flickering candlelight dances upon the stone walls, casting shadows that seem to whisper the names of those who have gone before, their loyalty etched in the ages. As the monks chant their prayers, the echo of their voices intertwines with the solemnity of the moment, creating an atmosphere where honor is paramount
